title: Fundle Bundle
description: Beloved local kids program in Scranton, Pennsylvania. Miss Trudy and Edward R. Meow chat with  kids about their lives and dreams.
quote: What do you want to be when you grow up?
altHero: Edward R. Meow, a cat puppet
alt1: Miss Trudy enters a gate to a storybook set
alt2: Edward R. Meow talks with a blonde kid
alt3: Edward R. Meow talks with a young Chet Montgomery
alt4: Edward R. Meow talks with a young Michael Scott
